AI Chat Navigator: Navigation Sidebar, Mindmap & Export for ChatGPT & More
Navigate, search, visualize, copy & export conversations across multiple AI platforms such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek

AI Chat Navigator is the original extension that adds a powerful, draggable navigation panel to your favorite AI chat websites — turning long threads into structured, searchable, and reusable knowledge.

It works seamlessly with popular platforms such as ChatGPT and Gemini, along with five other leading AI chat platforms. 

It runs locally in your browser and collects no data.

🚀🚀🚀 Core Features

1. Quick Overview
- Conversation Overview: Instantly view all questions/prompts in a conversation in a linear outline.
- Response Overview: Instantly view all sections in a response in a linear outline or a tree-structured mindmap. 

2. Navigation
- Conversation Navigation: Click a prompt in the main navigation panel to jump directly to that prompt-response pair in the conversation. 
- Response Navigation: Click a section in the response navigation panel to jump directly to that section in the response.
- Real-Time Update: New prompt and response sections are captured and added automatically.
- Current-Position Highlight: The navigation panel highlights the prompt currently visible in the chat and keeps it in view as you scroll, so you never lose your place in long conversations.

3. Search 
- Prompt & response section search: Search the current conversation by keyword to instantly locate matching prompts and response sections, with matches highlighted directly in the navigation panel.

4. Copy & Download (Per-Item + Batch)
- Copy Options:
  - Copy in Markdown or plain text
  - Copy a single QA pair or the entire thread
- Download Options:
  - Download in Markdown, TXT, or PDF
  - Download per QA pair or batch download all QAs
  - Export the mindmap as SVG or PNG (full-map export)

5. User-Friendly UI
- Draggable & Resizable Panel: Position and resize the navigation panel freely to match your workflow.
- Adaptive Panel Height: Panel height adjusts automatically based on the number of questions/prompts.
- Adaptive Panel Positioning: Panel position auto-adjusts to stay close to the chat area and input box without overlapping either.
- Clean, On-Demand Controls: Action buttons and menus stay hidden until needed (revealed on hover).

6. Multi-Platform Support
AI Chat Navigator works across major AI chat platforms such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Grok. It's also compatible with Perplexity and Qwen and more platforms are planned for future releases.
Across supported platforms, core workflows are available in one consistent UI.

🎯🎯🎯 Why AI Chat Navigator?
Whether you are researching, coding, studying, or brainstorming, AI Chat Navigator gives you a simple workflow: find what matters, understand it quickly, and reuse it anywhere.
- Find: Scan or search the thread in the navigation panel and jump directly to the exact prompt, answer, or section you need.
- Understand: Open a response outline or mindmap to break long answers into a clear structure that is easier to follow.
- Reuse: Copy or export one QA pair or the full conversation in Markdown, TXT, or PDF for notes, docs, and future reference.

The result is less scrolling, faster comprehension, and a more consistent workflow across major AI chat platforms in a clean, draggable, theme-aware interface.

Stop losing track of your best ideas in endless scrolling and start gaining instant clarity with structured navigation.

Text Shortcuts: canned messages and replies
Use customizable text shortcuts for frequently used text responses like canned replies. Save time and type smarter!

Simplify typing with Text Shortcuts.

Text Shortcuts is your go-to tool for creating and managing personalized keyboard shortcuts for frequently used text phrases. Whether it's responding to emails, engaging with customers, or just speeding up repetitive typing, this extension has you covered. Use Text Shortcuts to craft canned replies, auto-response messages, or even canned email templates for Gmail.

➤ Available features:

Expand your productivity toolbox with canned responses for Gmail or other platforms. This extension allows users to pre-define and manage frequently used phrases, turning repetitive typing into a single keystroke. Text Shortcuts saves time and reduces effort, whether you're composing auto-responses in Gmail or crafting canned email messages.

•  Customizable shortcuts. Create shortcuts for any text phrase, and assign them a unique trigger (such as /welcome or /thanks).
•  Organized folders. Group shortcuts into folders like "Work emails" or "Support responses" for easy management.
•  Quick access. Configure a browser hotkey to instantly open and close the extension.
•  Edit and delete with ease. Modify or remove shortcuts as your needs change with a clean, user-friendly interface.
•  Error validation. Avoid duplicate or invalid shortcuts with built-in guidance.

➤ How it works:

1. Open the extension by clicking on the icon next to the address bar or using the configured browser hotkey.
2. Add a new shortcut by specifying a name, folder, and trigger.
3. Access your saved shortcuts directly from the menu when you right-click.
4. Type your trigger in any input field, and watch your saved text auto-complete instantly!
5. Organize shortcuts into folders for better workflow efficiency.

➤ Use cases:

•  Customer support. Respond to FAQs like "shipping updates" or "refunds" faster than ever with canned responses or pre-written replies.
•  Sales professionals. Quickly send templated responses like price negotiations or product inquiries using canned messages in Gmail.
•  Personal productivity. Automate typing of addresses, email signatures, or frequent reminders. Ideal for setting up canned messages Gmail users can utilize repeatedly.
•  Gmail users. Take advantage of auto-response capabilities and create canned response examples that boost efficiency.

Stop wasting time on repetitive typing. Download Text Shortcuts today and type smarter, not harder!

This Chrome browser extension provides support for activating links and other HTML elements using voice commands.

Click by Voice numbers each clickable or focusable item at all times and allows activating them via keyboard.  For example, to open a link numbered 13 in a new window, you could manually hit control shift space then type "13:w" into the resulting pop-up then hit enter.  In practice, a voice command like "window pick 1 3" would be used to type these keys.  

WARNING: this extension by itself provides no voice functionality; procurement of the needed voice commands is the user's responsibility. One recommended means of doing this is to use Vocola (http://vocola.net/). 

Supported functionality includes focusing input elements, clicking elements, opening links in the same tab/a new (focused) tab/a new window, and removing the keyboard focus from the current element.  For how to use Click by Voice, see https://github.com/mdbridge/click-by-voice/blob/master/README.md.  CbV provides functionality similar to that of Firefox's mouseless browsing extension for voice control.

Hover and click to copy LaTeX expressions on ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Wikipedia, Stack Exchange and other math-related websites.

Copy LaTeX code from any KaTeX or MathJax-rendered math expression directly in your browser. It also works with Wikipedia images. Hover over an equation to reveal a “Click to copy” overlay, then click to instantly copy the LaTeX code to your clipboard. Works on ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Stack Exchange, ProofWiki and any website using KaTeX or MathJax as well as Wikipedia and Wikiwand.

v1.4 Update: Now you can also select text that includes equations and right click to copy the selection as Markdown.

v1.5 Update: Now with Typst support! You can choose between LaTeX mode or Typst mode.

v1.6 Update: You can now set some config options like the theme or the context menu in the popup UI.

GitHub repo with source code and more details: https://github.com/Mapaor/copy-latex-chrome-extension.

UI wireframes in Chrome. Drag sketch-style elements, resize, and screenshot easily.

UI Builder – Mockup Tool is a fast Web Wireframe & Web Design Tool that lets you sketch UI layouts on any live page or on a new blank page. Quickly show clients possible design changes directly on the live website, without switching tools.

🔵 Built for designers, product owners, developers and business analysts who need instant mockups without leaving the page. Drag-and-drop hand-drawn widgets, resize them smoothly, edit text in place, snap a quick screenshot, and share — all 100 % locally in your browser for rapid prototyping.

🔹 Instant wireframes – turn any site (or a blank canvas) into a playground for mockups
🔹 True WYSIWYG – change button labels, headers and colours right on the screen
🔹 Keyboard friendly – Ctrl/⌘ + C/V to duplicate, Delete to remove, Esc to cancel
🔹 Pixel-perfect exports – save the selected area as PNG or copy a screenshot to clipboard
🔹 Privacy first – no network calls, analytics or trackers; data lives in chrome.storage.local
🔹 Lightweight – injected only on demand, keeping everyday browsing fast

1️⃣ Install & pin the toolbar icon
2️⃣ Click UI Builder – the palette appears
3️⃣ Drag widgets (buttons, headers, inputs, frames, dividers…) onto the page or blank canvas
4️⃣ Resize / recolour until it looks right
5️⃣ Press the disk icon, draw a marquee, confirm ✓ – get your PNG or paste straight to Slack / Figma / Jira

Perfect for:
🔹 quick idea sketching before opening heavy design tools
🔹 annotating client websites during live calls
🔹 teaching web-design basics without extra software
🔹 creating product screenshots for specs and tickets

🚀 Add "UI Builder – Mockup Tool" Chrome extension today and start wireframing the web in one click!
Chrome plugin for *pass* the standard unix password manager.

Simple extension to integrate pass - the standard Unix password manager - with chrome.

IMPORTANT:

 1. This plugin requires the chrome-pass python package installed on your machine.
 2. You must also have the unix password manager (pass) installed and your password store located at $HOME/.password-store.
 3. Chrome version 107 or later.

To install the chrome-pass python package in Ubuntu:

 sudo apt-get install python3 pipx
 pipx install chrome-pass==1.0.1

Удобное расширение позволяющее легко исправлять текст написанный в неправильной раскладке или регистре.

С этим расширением вы можете легко исправить текст, написанный в неправильной раскладке или регистре. Просто выделите текст и нажмите сочетание клавиш Alt+W + прокрутка колесиком мыши, чтобы моментально исправить текст. Также, можно щелкнуть по иконке расширения и отредактировать текст из удобного всплывающего окна. Забудьте о лишних трудностях в редактировании текста — Инверсия раскладки и регистра текста сделает это быстро и легко!

Способы использования:
- Вызвать контекстное меню нажав на выделенный текст правой кнопкой мыши
- Исправление текста в всплывающем окне расширения (открывается нажатием на иконку расширения), можно исправлять выделенный/вставленный из буфера обмена текст

Комбинации для быстрого исправления выделенного текста:
- Alt+W + скролл мыши для исправления  выделенного текста
- Ctrl+Q+R - Инверсия раскладки текста
- Ctrl+Q+E - Переключение  текста в латиницу
- Ctrl+Q+Y - Переключение текста в кириллицу
- Ctrl+Q+I - Инверсия регистра выделенного текста
- Ctrl+Q+U - Переключение текста в верхний регистр
- Ctrl+Q+L - Переключение текста в нижний регистр
Generate your 2FA passwords with 2FAuth directly from your browser

The perfect companion to your 2FAuth instance.

As a 2FAuth user you already know how much easy it is to get a fresh One-Time Password. This extension brings your 2FAuth data directly to your browser toolbar for even more convenience and efficiency. No more need to retrieve your 2FAuth tab or open a new one, it's always there.

Get most of the features you love from the 2FAuth wep app: New 2FA registration, On-click or Always-on OTP generation, theming, auto-lock, password formatting, OTP obfuscation and more.

Your data stays safe. The extension is password-protected. sensitive data, such as your access token, is saved encrypted to the extension's storage.

Requirement:
You need a 2FAuth user account and a Personal Access Token to configure this extension.

What is 2FAuth?
2FAuth is a web-based, self-hosted alternative to One Time Passcode (OTP) generators like Google Authenticator, designed for both mobile and desktop.

Adds a button to copy the title and URL of the current page for pasting as rich text.

Adds a simple "Copy Title and URL" button to the browser that you can use to copy the URL and title of the active tab (page) into Clipboard as markup and rich text so you can paste into any other application.

For example, if you paste to Slack or Notion you'll get the page title linked to the page URL. If you paste to a plain text editor you'll get the markup variant: [title](URL).

Finds all sorts of images and videos located under the cursor.

Find and extract all images, pictures, GIFs, background images and videos laying under the cursor, whatever their depth or nesting in the DOM tree. This extension also supports extracting the current frame of canvas elements.

This is useful to bypass the HTML, Javascript or CSS tricks some websites use to prevent the user from accessing the page assets — which is plain ridiculous, as there are accessible anyway.

Usage: right-click on any image or video, then select “Images under cursor”: a list of found images will appear, that you can open or save. You can also use the Ctrl+Shift+F keyboard shortcut. The shortcut can be customized in Chrome settings. You can use Escape to close the dialog.

This extension is open-source software licensed under MIT. Visit website link for source.

This Chrome extension is a powerful tool designed to assist NetSuite administrators to write, edit, run, analyze, and manage…

This Chrome extension is a powerful tool designed to assist NetSuite administrators to write, edit, run, analyze, and manage SuiteQL queries directly from any NetSuite record page, without the need for any installations on client accounts. This extension is completely free to use!

Some of the key features include:

SuiteQL Syntax Highlighting and Formatting: The extension provides syntax highlighting and formatting capabilities for SQL queries, making it easier to write and read complex queries.

Auto-complete for Table and Field Names: The tool offers an auto-complete feature that suggests table and field names as users type, saving time and reducing the risk of errors.

Records Catalog Browsing: Users can browse the NetSuite Records Catalog directly within the extension, allowing them to explore available records and their associated fields.

Boilerplate Query Generation: Using this extension, you can generate boilerplate queries based on the available fields and records specific to the NetSuite account the user is currently logged into.

Query Management: The extension eliminates the worry of losing work by providing the ability to save, load, import, and export queries to JSON format. This feature enables users to port their work to different machines and share it with their team members with ease. Also, if you accidentally close the current tab you are working on, you can re-open the extension, it will remember your work.

Multiple Tab Support: If you need to easily test and run a smaller part of your SQL query without erasing or altering the current query you are working on, we got you covered. The extension allows you to quickly switch between tabs to work on a completely new instance of the query editor, without affecting your main tab.

Data Security and Performance Optimization: This query editor has been developed with a strong focus on data security and performance optimization. It does not collect any data and has no visibility into the information users query using the application.

With these powerful features and more to come, this Chrome extension is designed to enhance the productivity and efficiency of NetSuite administrators in writing complex SuiteQL queries.

메뉴에…

뤼튼 편의성 개선 확장 프로그램

# 기능들
## 단축키 기능

단축키를 저장합니다. (최대 9개)

채팅바에 저장할 내용을 입력후 +버튼을 누르면 추가됩니다.

ctl + 1~9 단축키 사용 가능합니다.

## 페르소나 기능

메뉴에 페르소나 항목이 생깁니다.

페르소나를 채팅방에서 빠르게 수정 가능합니다.

## 유저노트 요약 기능

유저노트를 요약해서 저장해줍니다. (업데이트는 주기적으로 해주세요.)

## Memory Afterburner 기능

진행 내용을 저장해 기억을 향상기키는 기능입니다.

템플릿별 프롬프트 선택이 가능합니다. (1 : 1 캐릭터챗,시뮬레이션,커스텀)


## 랭킹 플러스 기능

좋아요가 10개 이상 채팅수가 30개 이상인 모든 캐릭터챗을 불러옵니다.

개념글 같은 기능이라 생각하시면 됩니다.

## (제작기능) 캐챗 복붙 기능

캐릭터 챗을 json화 시켜 복사 붙혀넣기가 가능하게 만들어 줍니다.

## (제작기능) publish 기능

비공개인 캐챗을 공개 상태로 복제해 개시합니다.

## (제작기능) 프롬프트 저장 및 복사 기능

프롬프트를 저장할수있는 기능입니다.
Copy on text selection in current page automatically. Double-click to select and copy text automatically. Ctrl + click to paste.

Do you routinely copy text from one webpage to another page or app? Are your fingers strained and hurting from all that copying and pasting? Or, do you just want or need a helping hand?

Well then this is the perfect extension for you!

Copy text on a webpage simply by selecting it! With a bonus "Ctrl + click" to paste text!

Features:

- *New* "Copied" confirmation bubble.
- Select text on page with mouse or touchpad and release to copy text selection automatically.
- Double-click text to select that word, sentence, or paragraph and copy automatically.
- Ctrl + A to select all then click with mouse to copy and deselect.
- Hold alt while selecting to disable copy on select functionality in real-time.
- Ctrl + click to paste clipboard text.
- Dark mode on/off.

If you need to select text to replace while "copy on text selection" is turned on and you don't want to overwrite your clipboard in doing so:

- Hold alt + select text to disable "copy on text selection" in real-time. Note that after you make your text selection, the mouse button must be released before the alt key.
  
- Alternatively (although alt + select is better IMO), you could select the text that you want to replace first and then select text from another page with copy on select functionality. Then come back to the page where you already have the text selected that you want to replace and paste.
  
- You could also select text to copy and then when you go to select other text to replace and ctrl + v before releasing the mouse button (because the mouse up triggers the copy of the selected text). This works between different pages and also within the same page.

Planned updates:

- Triple-click to select sentences or paragraphs and copy selection automatically. For now, you can either hold mouse down and select the sentence or paragraph, or triple-click and then click again to copy (so quadruple-click basically).

Notes:

- For the CoTS feature to work, either after installing the extension or toggling the feature on, you may need to refresh any pages/tabs that were previously open.

- The features included in this extension may not work on some deeper level div, textbox, iframe, or other protected elements.

- When using "ctrl + click" to paste, you may get a pop-up from the site you're on saying that it is requesting access to your clipboard. This happens because the extension is handling the paste action (on ctrl + click) to paste your clipboard content into the site's page. Your clipboard information is not uploaded or sent to any site (that you're not already pasting to) and is not sent to the developer or uploaded to any other servers.

Donate: https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=DQ5LYLT8NA26W
Save Google Meet chat to clipboard. Optimized for personal Google accounts. Features 1-click copy and auto-save.

Google Meet Chat to Clipboard is a Chrome extension designed for personal Google accounts that allows you to easily save Google Meet chat content to your clipboard.

Key Features:
- One-click copy button: Integrated directly into the chat sidebar for quick access.
- Auto-save on meeting exit: Automatically copies chat history to your clipboard when you leave the call.
- Picture-in-Picture support: Works seamlessly even when using Meet in PinP mode.
- Tab close protection: Prevents accidental data loss by showing a dialog if unsaved chat messages exist when closing the tab.
- Complete chat history: Consolidates all messages into a single, structured text block.
- Optimized workflow: Simple copy-and-paste process to improve your meeting productivity.

How to Use:
1. Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store.
2. Join a Google Meet call using a personal Google account.
3. Use the integrated copy button or simply leave the meeting to trigger the auto-save.
4. Paste the content wherever you need it.

Privacy & Security:
- Local processing only: Chat content is processed exclusively within your browser and copied to your clipboard.
- No data storage: Nothing is saved, tracked, or transmitted to external servers.
- Exclusively for Chrome: Designed to work optimally with the Google Chrome browser.

Compatibility Notes:
- Account Type: This extension is optimized for personal Google accounts (@gmail.com).
- Google Workspace: Functionality in Google Workspace environments is not guaranteed. Due to domain-specific settings and native Google Chat integration, this extension may not work as expected in Workspace accounts.
- Maintenance: This extension may require updates due to changes in Google Meet’s technical specifications. Regular updates are provided to maintain compatibility.
